description_long: This is a wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored timber planks, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. One side features a small covered porch with a simple wooden railing, providing an inviting entryway. The cabin has multiple rectangular windows with grid-like muntins, allowing natural light to enter the interior. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground on short supports, suggesting protection from moisture. Overall, the design is simple yet functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or park setting.
description: A light wooden cabin with a gable roof, covered porch, and multiple grid windows, elevated on short supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main window, covered porch, and entryway with visible wooden railing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the cabin, two windows, and the full extent of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden wall and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and uninterrupted wooden siding.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in reddish-brown asphalt shingles and slight overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Three rectangular windows with grid muntins: one on the front facade, one on the right side, and one on the left side, arranged asymmetrically and evenly spaced
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the front facade, adjacent to the porch and offset to the left
